title: Finance Analyst (Bank) (JT)
description:
Technical skills and competencies trainee will learn

The candidate will be exposed to financial instruments, in particular, bonds, credit default swaps (CDS) and total return swaps (TRS). He/she will also gain knowledge of trade life cycle, trade reporting flows and the controls supporting them.

In supporting the structuring desk, he/she will gain an understanding of trading strategies.

Job Description

Daily deliverables:

1. Daily PL report production and PL decomposition

2. Provide commentary on significant PL drivers and relating it to the business strategies of the desk

3. Monitoring of New Deals, Late Deals and Market Operations

4. Monitoring checks for transactions done at Off Market rates and arrive at justifications/reasons for entering these transactions

5. Exceptions monitoring on Reported PL vs Trader Estimates and breaches on threshold limits for unexplained PL attributions

Monthly deliverables:

6. GLAO certification on Balance Sheet accounts

7. Room wide & Desk level Reserves computation

8. Reporting of Key Risk and Performance Indicators for the desks

Ad-Hoc & Projects tasks:

9. Streamline workflows to enhance operational efficiency in our deliverables

10. Review control processes for gaps

11. Responding to ad-hoc queries from Front Office/RMG/TMO/Finance leveraging data to provide insights & forecasting

              Job Requirement

• Degree holder in Accountancy, Banking or Finance is preferred.

• Knowledge of treasury products, derivatives is preferred.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Microsoft Excel

• Strong team player

• Strong control awareness and inquisitive mindset


This job advertisement is posted by:
